# Forgebook

> Microsoft Foundry cookbook of runnable Jupyter notebook recipes, hands-on AI guides, and examples for building agents, model inference, and multimodal apps.

Forgebook recipes are authored as Jupyter notebooks and rendered as public recipe pages. For LLM context, prefer the Markdown recipe links below: they contain the notebook narrative and code in a compact text format without site navigation or client-side UI.

Publishing is explicit. Notebook source files live in `notebooks/`, public metadata lives in `registry.yaml`, author profiles live in `authors.yaml`, and topic tags live in `tags.yaml`.

## Recipes

- [Build a Multilingual Text-to-Speech Recipe with MAI-Voice-2](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-voice-2.md): MAI-Voice-2 notebook with key-auth REST calls, multilingual speakers, expressive SSML, and cost calculator patterns. Tags: mai, models, inference, multimodal.
- [Build a Production Editing Recipe with MAI-Image-2.5](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-image-2-5.md): Private-preview MAI-Image-2.5 notebook covering text-to-image generation, image edits, safety reminders, and troubleshooting. Tags: mai, models, inference, multimodal.
- [Build Speech-to-Text with MAI-Transcribe-1.5](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-transcribe-1-5.md): Speech API multipart cookbook for MAI-Transcribe-1.5 covering baseline transcription, verbatim mode, phrase-list entity biasing, and language identification. Tags: mai, models, inference, multimodal.
- [Call MAI-Image-2 from a Foundry Deployment](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-image-2-foundry.md): Foundry-focused MAI-Image-2 notebook covering deployment-based calls, prompt variants, and cost breakdown. Tags: mai, models, inference, images, image-generation, multimodal.
- [Create Your First Agent (Part 1)](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/foundry-agent-part-1.md): Step-by-step tutorial to deploy gpt-5-mini on Microsoft Foundry, create an AI agent with Web Search, and test it from the Foundry portal. Tags: agents, agent-service, prompt-agents, tools, web-search.
- [Generate Images with MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-2e](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-image-2.md): MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-2e text-to-image notebook with prompt variations, parameter tuning, and token-based cost calculations. Tags: mai, models, inference, images, image-generation, multimodal.
- [Generate Speech with MAI-Voice-1](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-voice-1-foundry.md): MAI-Voice-1 notebook using Foundry endpoint with REST and SDK patterns, long-form synthesis, and character-based cost estimation. Tags: mai, models, inference, speech, text-to-speech, audio, audio-generation.
- [Guide Sora 2 with Images and Audio](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/sora-video-generation-rest-api.md): Use Azure OpenAI REST calls to generate a Sora 2 clip, reuse a frame as an image reference, and add ambient audio. Tags: azure-openai, video, video-generation, audio, audio-generation, multimodal, responsible-ai.
- [Mastering Foundry IQ](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mastering-foundry-iq.md): End-to-end Foundry IQ walkthrough covering Knowledge Source types, a unified Knowledge Base, and integrations with Foundry Agent Service and Microsoft Agent Framework. Tags: iq, retrieval, grounding, azure-ai-search, mcp, agents, agent-service, agent-framework.
- [Tools and Your First Code (Part 2)](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/foundry-agent-part-2.md): Connect your agent to Microsoft Learn and GitHub MCP servers, handle MCP approval requests, explore the tool catalog, and see your agent defined in YAML and Python. Tags: agents, agent-service, tools, mcp, sdk.
- [Transcribe Audio with MAI-Transcribe-1](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/notebook/mai-transcribe-1-foundry.md): Entra-first MAI-Transcribe-1 notebook with Foundry endpoint setup, local audio transcription, diarization, translation, and cost estimation. Tags: mai, models, inference, speech, transcription, audio.

## Optional

- [Forgebook homepage](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/): Rendered recipe index for humans, including search and tag filters.
- [Forgebook RSS feed](https://microsoft-foundry.github.io/forgebook/rss.xml): Feed of published recipes.
- [Forgebook source repository](https://github.com/microsoft-foundry/forgebook): Notebook source, registry metadata, site code, and contribution guidance.
- [Microsoft Foundry documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/foundry): Official Microsoft Foundry documentation.
